objective: Create and verify a Notes note with zero cursor warp on both the create step AND the body-focus step. First narrow skill whose entire activation chain is keyboard-only at the driver level.

focus_candidate.note: Optional serialized contract::Candidate for promoted native-text validation. Falls back to the hard-coded query when empty.

preconditions: 备忘录 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.

notes: First narrow skill with a fully cursor-warp-free activation chain. create-note uses debug.axPressButton; focus-body uses debug.axFocusTextInput. Both steps assert cursorDisturbance=none.
Top-level max_disturbance is clipboard because paste-note-body still uses the clipboard. No step warps the cursor at any point.
strategy.activation is ax-perform-action-clipboard-paste — the taxonomy label now matches the runtime reality (no pointer focus, only AX action + AX focus + clipboard paste).

steps.purpose: Create a fresh note via AXUIElementPerformAction.
Focus the note body via AXUIElementSetAttributeValue(kAXFocusedAttribute). This is the step that v1 left as pointer warp; v2 replaces it so the whole chain is cursor-warp-free.
Write the marker into the body of the note through the clipboard so the exact ASCII marker survives input-method quirks.
Verify the body text through the AX tree, not screenshot OCR.

expected_signals: Notes can be activated and a new note can be created through AXUIElementPerformAction without warping the cursor.
The body text area can be focused via AXUIElementSetAttributeValue(kAXFocusedAttribute) without warping the cursor.
Both create-note and focus-body driver responses report cursorDisturbance=none.
The marker text can be pasted into the note body.
The same marker can be verified through the AX tree.
success_criteria: create-note signals match cursorDisturbance=none, pressMechanism=ax-action, performedAction=AXPress.
focus-body signals match cursorDisturbance=none, focusMechanism=ax-attribute, setAttribute=AXFocused.
The marker is visible in the AX tree under the note body contract.
No step in the recipe warps the macOS cursor.
non_goals: This recipe does not prove cross-app browser or music-player reuse.
This recipe does not exercise smartPress fallback.

known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run concurrently with another Notes recipe against the same live app instance.
